title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at NSE

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Financial Analyst at NSE
jsonLd.description:
NSE is actively seeking a talented and motivated Financial Analyst to join our dynamic team in Dhanbad. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About NSE:
NSE is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with NSE!
